infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Holobots reads your step count and workout data to convert activity into Sync Points.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: Holobots writes workout rewards and sync summaries connected to your activity.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Holobots uses your location during a workout to measure live movement speed and distance for Sync Point rewards.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: Holobots reads step and motion activity during workouts to reward Sync Points.
